raw_consumer_statement:
Issue : XXXX item accepted, refund never issued. XXXX instructed me to close dispute. Card issuer mishandled dispute and charged improper interest. 

What happened : I am filing this complaint because XXXX failed to issue a refund for a returned item and instructed me to close my dispute. Citi then mishandled the dispute and charged me interest I should not have owed. 

I mailed my return to XXXX on XX/XX/year>, and it was delivered on XX/XX/year>. Despite multiple attempts to contact them, they never provided an update. Because of the lack of response, I opened a dispute with Citi. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX contacted XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX, I received an email from XXXX confirming my return had been processed and that a refund would be issued. Relying on this confirmation, I closed the dispute. 

XXXX weeks passed with no refund. When I noticed an interest charge on the disputed amount, I contacted Citi and was told the provisional credit had been reversed, resulting in a remaining balance of {$91.00} plus interest. I ultimately had to pay {$94.00} total on XX/XX/year>. 

When I contacted XXXX again, I was told they would not issue the refund because the charge had been disputed, even though I had already cancelled the dispute at their direction. I was repeatedly told someone from billing would follow up, but no one ever did. 

During another call, XXXX told me the refund had been issued, yet I have never received any refund. When I contacted Citi again on XX/XX/year>, I was informed that XXXX likely instructed me to close the dispute because they did not intend to issue the refund in the first place. 

As of today, I am left with : No product ( the return was accepted ), No refund despite written confirmation, {$94.00} paid out-of-pocket, including improper interest, And no ability to reopen the original dispute through Citi. 

This situation has caused direct financial harm and appears to involve unfair and deceptive practices by both GlassesUSA and Citis dispute process.
